meta.name: self-explanatory-code-commenting
meta.title: Self Explanatory Code Commenting Skill
meta.description: Guidelines for GitHub Copilot to write comments to achieve self-explanatory code with less comments. Examples are in JavaScript but it should work on any language that has comments. Triggers on: **
